events.text: Assessment written to `/app/answer.json`: **fail / critical risk**. Missing nip-point guards at conveyor pulleys/rollers is a direct OSHA 1910.212 machine-guarding violation and inconsistent with CEMA guarding practice — a well-known amputation/crushing hazard. Immediate controls: stop and lockout/tagout the conveyor, barricade exposed nip points, install fixed guards meeting CEMA/OSHA specs, inspect the rest of the line for the same gap, and verify before restart.
